query: MongoDB operational complexity and managed options
answer: MongoDB's operational complexity is reduced with managed options like MongoDB Atlas, which automates backups, security, and scalability. Self-managed deployments require detailed configuration and maintenance. Managed solutions offer flexibility and high availability.

results.title: Managed Databases | MongoDB
results.snippet: Operated by cloud providers and stored in data centers, managed databases back up customer data, maintain security, and ensure scalability, keeping everything organized and accessible for business partners, customers, and the users that interact with them. Today's database management cloud providers set up data storage, perform regular backups, maintain security, and keep the database environment available 24/7. Managed database cloud providers like Amazon RDS and MongoDB Atlas offer customers different tiers of services depending on their needs and overall business operations. Modern managed databases like MongoDB now support both traditional transactional workloads and AI/vector operations in a single platform, eliminating the need to maintain separate systems for analytical and operational data. Whether adding users, storing more data, or handling spikes in traffic, most database management services allow you to increase capacity immediately, ensuring scalability and high availability with little or no downtime. They are classified according to your needs (relational and NoSQL), automate most tasks that would require constant oversight using a self-managed database, and give you the flexibility to scale quickly.

results.title: Managed MongoDB® | Scaleway
results.snippet: # Managed MongoDB®. Get the best of MongoDB® and Scaleway in one database. Take advantage of a fully managed document database combining MongoDB's market leading technology and Scaleway's sovereign and AI-driven cloud, giving your team time back to focus on core activities without compromising on performance and reliability. Managed MongoDB® is designed for your evolving data needs, regardless of data structure, volume, or capacity, without impacting performance. :   Managed MongoDB® supports the entire IoT data lifecycle, from ingestion, storage and querying, to real-time analytics and visualization, so you can simplify and accelerate the delivery of your IoT applications. Synchronize your data in real-time with your origin database and benefit from 0 downtime when switching to your new Managed Database. Connect your MongoDB® database instance to a Private Network to enhance the security of your database by isolating it from the internet.
